```html Simulation Reports | WARPSimLab Skip to main content
WARPSimLab

Educational Personal Finance Simulation Software

Downloads
Overview Core Features Interface Views Reports FAQ Release Notes Legal

Simulation Reports

WARPSimLab can generate printable reports that summarize simulation results in a structured format. Reports are designed to help review simulation highlights, portfolio milestones, cash-flow results, charts, assumptions, and key outcome metrics.

The sample below uses demonstration data from the simulator. It is provided to show the type of report output WARPSimLab can generate.

WARPSimLab is for educational use only. It does not provide financial, investment, tax, legal, or retirement advice. Read the full legal disclaimer.

Sample Executive Summary Report preview using demonstration data from the simulator.

Available Reports

WARPSimLab reports are generated from simulations run in the desktop application. Additional report types may be added as the simulator evolves.

Executive Summary Report

A printable report that consolidates simulation highlights, portfolio milestones, income and cash-flow summaries, visualizations, risk indicators, and key assumptions.

View sample PDF

What the Executive Summary Report Includes

The Executive Summary Report provides a high-level view of a simulation run, making it easier to review major results without scanning each application view separately.

Simulation Highlights

Key output metrics such as starting portfolio value, ending portfolio value, simulated shortfall rate, total income, total expenses, and projection length.

Portfolio Milestones

Portfolio and asset summaries at major points in the simulation, including the start, retirement, and end of the projection period.

Cash-Flow Review

Income, expenses, taxes, net income, and net cash-flow summaries at selected milestone years.

Simulation Visuals

Charts for portfolio projections, income projections, cash-flow behavior, and historical window analysis where applicable.

Assumptions Appendix

A record of major user-provided inputs and report settings used to generate the simulation.

Printable Output

The report is formatted as a PDF-style document for review, saving, printing, or comparison.

To explore these features directly, visit the downloads page.

WARPSimLab

Educational personal finance simulation software.

```
